Chronology of every recorded fact about [[White Sun]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The silver pendant of the White Sun is worn by Andel.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — The White Sun is the symbol of the Luminian Order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The White Sun of the Luminians is a silver chain ornament worn by Andel.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The White Sun is a crest featured on red banners at Hightower.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The White Sun is a decoration on the silver armor of Luminian Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The White Sun is at Hightower and has a cleansing and penetrating light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The White Sun emblem is carved into doorposts in the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Andel has a White Sun hanging against his chest.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — The White Sun provides support to Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The White Sun is an item hanging from Loreli's chest that emits a soothing white-gold light.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
